dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
dialogue_segments.text: They want you afraid.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
dialogue_segments.text: Fear makes you easier to control.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
dialogue_segments.text: It's time to wake up.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: Your streets, so once again, run red with your blood.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 3
dialogue_segments.text: Raul Menendez ignited global unrest on an unprecedented scale.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
dialogue_segments.text: Menendez is a terrorist.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
dialogue_segments.text: We're bringing peace and security to the world.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 4
dialogue_segments.text: He refuses to let me go.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 3
dialogue_segments.text: Stop looking backwards, David, but matters is what we do next.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 3
dialogue_segments.text: A lot of people counting on us, Francis.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 3
dialogue_segments.text: Specter one, report.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 3
dialogue_segments.text: Need a sitrep.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 4
dialogue_segments.text: This isn't real.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 3
dialogue_segments.text: The hell it ain't!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: Obey your master!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: Control your master!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: Master of the invisible and the screen!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: Crushing your mind, crushing your dreams!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: You're my puppet, you can't see the strings!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: Just know my name is all you scream!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: Master! When the dream turns into a disaster!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: Master! Master!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: Just obey your master!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 3
dialogue_segments.text: Pull it together, man!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: So eager to lead the dance.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: Killing the man is a hell of a lot easier than killing the idea.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: You were never cut out to be a mason.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 3
dialogue_segments.text: No more games. This ends now.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: Obey your master!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 5
dialogue_segments.text: Get the Resnov challenge pack when you pre-order now.

dialogueData.summary: This audio is a promotional trailer for the video game Call of Duty: Black Ops II, featuring dramatic narration, character dialogue, and a musical sequence.

segments.description: Dramatic, tense cinematic score with heavy percussion and strings, layered with aggressive voiceover dialogue.
Dramatic, high-intensity cinematic score with driving percussion and electronic textures, layered with intense dialogue and sound effects.
Intense, high-energy cinematic action music with aggressive synths and driving percussion, punctuated by sound effects like explosions and whooshes.
High-intensity, action-oriented cinematic music with dramatic orchestral hits and electronic elements, interspersed with intense dialogue.
An energetic, high-octane trailer soundtrack featuring intense cinematic percussion, sound effects, and a promotional voiceover.

musicData.summary: The audio remains a high-octane, action-heavy trailer with intense cinematic music, sound effects, and shouting, maintaining a very high level of energy throughout.

chunks.summary: The video opens with fast-paced, intense visual cuts and dramatic dialogue about fear and control.

patience.reasoning: The fast cuts provide immediate visual punch, but the generic 'rising tensions' dialogue tests my 3-second rule.

boredom.reasoning: The rapid visual changes prevent me from scrolling immediately, even if the voiceover is a bit cliché.

excitement.reasoning: The high-energy music and rapid-fire visuals create enough intrigue to keep me watching to see what happens next.

chunks.summary: Glitchy skull face transitions to soldier running, then massive highway collapse with falling cars, ending on a wide shot of the devastated city skyline. Military comms add urgency to the visual chaos.

patience.reasoning: Glitch skull at 00:05 acts as a strong pattern interrupt; military dialogue creates narrative urgency without slowing the pace.

boredom.reasoning: Relentless visual changes (face -> run -> collapse -> tunnel -> skyline) prevent disengagement.

excitement.reasoning: Falling cars and crumbling highway deliver visceral impact; glitch aesthetic feels fresh and high-energy.

chunks.summary: Chaotic city destruction visuals transition into a bold title card reveal for Black Ops 7, followed by quick action cuts.

patience.reasoning: Logo animation at 3s triggers immediate scroll risk for this persona; corporate intros are a stated dealbreaker.

boredom.reasoning: Title card interrupts the flow; Alex hates generic intros and buzzwords, leading to high disengagement.

excitement.reasoning: Visual intensity (smoke, city) offers some energy, but the branding overlay dampens authentic engagement.
